findings: G-003 implement delivered react-virtual integration cleanly. getFilteredRowModel + useVirtualizer + flow layout spacer pattern (top/bottom <tr style={{height:N}}> per C-18) + SortAndRecompute 1000+ row story. tsc --noEmit exit 0, tsup ESM 5.70 KB (+2.45 KB vs G-002, well within 20 KB Pro limit). 3 ADRs (009/010/011) appended to decisions.md.

F-06 specCodeDefects[] under-reporting (1st occurrence anecdote): implement-score F-06 originally noted spec EC-004 + Section 11.2 orphan cell pseudocode logic inversion that implementer correctly self-corrected, but recorded `specCodeDefects: []` with rationale '(the pseudocode was illustrative; actual implementation logic was corrected to match intent)'. F-06 rubric body has no 'illustrative pseudocode' escape clause — obligation reads '자율 정정한 경우 ... specCodeDefects[] 필드에 기록 의무'. Same playbook as G-002 deferredAcs[] retroactive patch: implement-score.json patched to add 1 specCodeDefects[] entry + feedback line + F-06 evidence corrected to remove self-dismissal language. 1st occurrence — record as patternsObserved without rubric change. 2nd occurrence would justify F-06 clarification.

L-01 rowSpan-virtualization-boundary limitation (ADR-011) is correctly scoped to MOD-GRID-13 (cell merging is the only feature where body-row rowSpan is the primary product). MOD-GRID-14 Multi-row Header involves thead rowSpan (different scrolling semantics). MOD-GRID-11/12/15 don't intersect body rowSpan + virtualization. No cross-module catalog promotion warranted at 1st occurrence — ADR-011 stays package-local.

G-002 deferred AC-005 C-18 sub-clause fulfilled in G-003 via two complementary deliverables: (a) AC-002 useVirtualizer integration in MergingGrid.tsx, (b) AC-006 SortAndRecompute story with enableVirtualization=true + 1000+ row largeData. acceptedDeferredAcs binding in G-003 implement-score.json L165 correctly references the deferred ID 'MOD-GRID-13/G-002/AC-005#C-18-sub-clause'. A-05 v1.0.9 binding flow end-to-end validated.

C-29 exactOptionalPropertyTypes compliance: G-003 new optional props (enableVirtualization?, estimatedRowHeight?, virtualOverscan?) consumed via destructuring with default values at MergingGrid.tsx L58-62 — no child-component forwarding, conditional spread not required. Pattern matches C-29 'internal consumption' allowance (no spread pattern needed when props consumed directly).

C-31 functional wiring audit PASS: useVirtualizer imported at L9 + invoked at L103 + getVirtualItems()/getTotalSize() results used in rendering path L140-195. No standalone utility file created in G-003 (in-place hook + JSX integration) — C-31 N/A.

Build verification independent of TOMIS git: source files live in topvel-grid-monorepo/packages/ (external to TOMIS — ADR-MOD-GRID-00-001). F-03 N/A correctly applied; Glob 5 files confirms file existence per external-directory rule. ADR-009/010/011 in TOMIS-tracked decisions.md verified via Read.

EC-005 (1000-row useMemo cache effect) correctly relies on TanStack getRowModel().rows reference stability across re-renders without sort/filter state change — D3 decision (deps=[rows, mergeColumns, enableMerging]) absorbs sort/filter changes via TanStack-internal reference change. Anti-pattern of duplicating sort/columnFilters state into deps array correctly rejected.
Goals.json G-003 stages remain 'pending' status — state-sync to mark specify+implement+verify+self-review as 'done' is the final harness step after this self-review.
newCascadingRisks: R-1 (low): F-06 specCodeDefects[] under-reporting via 'illustrative pseudocode' self-dismissal — 1st occurrence anecdote. Implementer correctly inferred spec intent but dismissed the F-06 record obligation. Pattern: when spec body uses explicit disclaimer ('pseudocode for clarity' at G-003 spec L710), implementer treats the disclaimer as F-06 exemption. Rubric body does NOT include such exemption. If 2nd occurrence appears, add F-06 clarification: '자율 정정 시 spec disclaimer (illustrative/pseudocode/conceptual) 와 무관하게 specCodeDefects[] 기록 의무'. Current 1st occurrence — patched retroactively + noted in patternsObserved without rubric change.

R-2 (informational): MOD-GRID-13 MERGING area is now complete (G-001 + G-002 + G-003 all PASS 100). Cross-module cascading lessons primarily reside in (a) Pro-package grid-license inline stub pattern (C-24 Pattern Catalog Note, applies to MOD-GRID-12/14/15), (b) A-05 v1.0.9 deferredAcs[] flow (applies to any deferred sub-clause Goal), (c) ADR-009 useMemo TanStack-derived deps anti-duplication pattern (applies to any computeX over TanStack rows in Pro packages — MOD-GRID-12/15). No new catalog promotion needed at MOD-GRID-13 close.
